title: Amazon Linux 2023 - ALAS2023-2026-1581: Important priority package update for javapackages-bootstrap
description:
Package updates are available for Amazon Linux 2023 that fix the following vulnerabilities:
CVE-2025-67030:
	Directory Traversal vulnerability in the extractFile method of org.codehaus.plexus.util.Expand in plexus-utils before 6d780b3378829318ba5c2d29547e0012d5b29642. This allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code
